headline: The One Metric That Makes Costco Wholesale Stock Vulnerable

headline: Is KR Stock a Buy Now or a Value Trap for Cautious Investors?
summary: KR's low valuation, cash returns and balance-sheet flexibility support its value case, but consumer, pharmacy and margin pressures keep the buy case cautious.

headline: Ross Cully of Harvest Group named EY US Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2026 Southwest Award winner
summary: Ross Cully, Founder & CEO of Harvest Group, was named an EY US Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2026 Southwest Award winner. Cully was selected among nearly 1,000 program participants that included 592 finalists across 17 regions competing for the title.
